creator: root@dino.acn.pl
text:
when try run program via jail:
 # jail /nfs/CHROOT ftpd 11.23.34.45 /bin/tcsh
 
 In /var/log/messages:
 Nov  5 16:06:42 nfs /kernel: nfs send error 22 for server noga:/vol0/nfs
 Nov  5 16:06:48 nfs last message repeated 61 times
 Nov  5 16:12:18 nfs /kernel: nfs send error 22 for server noga:/vol0/nfs
 
 it's work VERY slow, but end ok! Any ls, exec etc. function work SLOW and
  generate more errors into syslo
 
 
 How-To-Repeat:
 	any exec, open etc. call.
 Fix:
